action.reasoning: Observation: Current best EER=0.0787 (dev EER~0.0003) with WavLM-large+masked-stats-pool+MLP(0.5 dropout); model.py now has correct _get_feature_vector_attention_mask fix but train.py is incomplete/truncated (broken loop at 'outputs = m') causing prior crashes. Strong overfitting to seen attacks persists despite aug/wd/scheduler. Analysis: Masked pooling eliminates padding bias in mean/std; doubled bs (16/64) + 6 epochs fits ~1h budget (prior ~11min/epoch at bs=8, now ~half time). Proper metrics.jsonl logging, best-save with pretrained_name, full loops fix all issues. Root cause of OOD gap is distribution shift (codecs/unseen attacks); current setup maximizes generalization within constraints. Decision: Rewrite complete train.py (bs=16/64, epochs=6, lr=3e-6, wd=1e-3, T_max=6, full eval+logging+save logic, minimal stdout); keep model.py/predict.py; execute training then submit_eval on best.pt for improved EER within time.
